states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Cursed Demon Princess
states.description: Hibiki Himeno was never discouraged. Not when she became a vessel. Not when the false requiem began. Even in the depths of despair, she laughs, her eyes always lit with the light of the future.

states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Cursed Demon Princess
states.description:
But what if this body itself was a fabrication?
What if her memories had been forged?
What if there was no actual future in the first place?
Could she still overcome that despair?

states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Cursed Demon Princess
states.description:
Now, only one thing is true.
Only one thing anchors her.
The days she spent with her dear friend.
Hibiki resolved to live as long as that friend was alive as well. Even if they were never to meet again.
